The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Allobriquetia is often used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
